title: Notification No.49/2016-Cus(NT), dated 13.04.2016
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance Department of Revenue Notification No. 49/2016-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, dated the 13th April, 2016 S.O. (E). -In exercise of powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub- section (1) of section 5 of Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints officers mentioned in column (4) to act as a Common Adjudicating Authority to exercise powers and discharge duties conferred or imposed on officers mentioned in column (3) of table below in respect of cases mentioned in column (2) of said table for purpose of adjudication of show cause notices mentioned herein, namely:- Table Sl. No Noticee's name and Show Cause Notice Number and date Answerable to Common Adjudicating Authority 1 2 3 4 1 Rajesh Khetterpal, Paschim Vihar, New Delhi and others 23/63/2010 (Pt-III) dated 12.02.2015 Commissioner of Customs(II), Chennai Additional Director General (Adjudication), Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, New Delhi Principal Commissioner of Customs(Port), Kolkata Principal Commissioner of Customs, Noida Principal Commissioner of Customs(Import), Inland Container Depot, Tughlakabad, New Delhi Commissioner of Customs, Tuticorin Additional Commissioner of Customs (Nhava Sheva-I), Mumbai Zone-II.
